title: Comedy Club 4 Kids
company: has expanded from one London residency to being countrywide, running shows and workshops all over the UK from Peebles to Portsmouth, even producing a book on how to write and perform stand-up, and hosting our own Radio Nonsense podcast to bring the sillies to families all over the world.

reviews.excerpt: Genre: Children's Theatre , Comedic , Comedy , Family , Stand-Up “Since 2005, the Comedy Club 4 Kids has been getting the best performers from the international circuit to do their thing for an audience of children (aged 6+) and their families… but without the rude bits!
